title: Lesson 222: 横, 四日, 四つ...

items.gloss: horizontal (as opposed to vertical); lying down; side-to-side (as opposed to front-to-back); width; breadth; side (of a box, etc.); beside; aside; next to; unconnected
fourth day of the month; four days
four; four years of age; ten o'clock (old time system); cross grips
to call out (to); to call; to invoke; to summon (a doctor, etc.); to invite; to designate; to name; to brand; to garner (support, etc.); to gather; to take as one's wife
to read; to count; to guess; to predict; to read (someone's thoughts); to see (e.g. into someone's heart); to divine
